name: security-audit
description: Run security audit and fix findings

steps.task: Run npm audit (or equivalent) and review all dependencies for known vulnerabilities. Identify all findings at {{severity}} level or above. List each vulnerability, affected package, and recommended fix.

Fix the vulnerabilities found in step 1: update affected packages, apply patches, or replace insecure dependencies. For code-level issues (SQL injection, XSS, path traversal), fix the vulnerable code patterns. Do not introduce breaking changes.
Re-run the security audit and verify all findings at {{severity}} level or above are resolved. Run the test suite to confirm no regressions. Document the fixes in a SECURITY-FIXES.md file.
